TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Qmocyan, title = Qmocyan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qmocyan} }

S.FORM: alang Qmocyan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 28 buwan, 77 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 72 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qmocyan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Qmocyan hya' ga Blhuy. tay mkyahu' na Qmocyan hya' ga Babau. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Qmocyan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 28 buwan, 77 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 72 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qmocyan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Qmocyan hya' ga Blhuy. tay mkyahu' na Qmocyan hya' ga Babau. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč qmo ¶~ ®jan …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na qmo ¶~ ®jan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na qmo ¶~ ®jan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na qmo ¶~ ®jan ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na qmo ¶~ ®jan ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na qmo ¶~ ®jan ńßja Ē …£a ő≤lńßuj. taj mkjańßu Ē na qmo ¶~ ®jan ńßja Ē …£a ő≤aő≤au. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
